creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also don't think whole exp-run is needed.  But I suggest check following ports:

- lang/python-doc-*
I somehow feel those ports are not very useful, but we need to updated them before they get deprecated.

- databases/py-gdbm
- databases/py-sqlite3
- x11-toolkits/py-tkinter
Above three are extracted from the official release and has "allflavors" in USE_PYTHON.

I am fine to add lang/python311 when above ports are checked.
